description: A customer sold their vehicle to a private party and wants to transfer the remaining connected services and warranty to the new owner.

nodes.task_description: Verify the identity of the original owner.
Collect the new owner's name and contact information.
Update the vehicle's record in the system with the new owner's information, initiating the transfer process for any applicable services.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the ownership record in the master vehicle database.
